summary: Design update testing complete for euroadria.me overhaul. All pages verified with new design system: gold (#D5B781) accents, dark navy (#04151F) buttons, cream (#F9F5EE) backgrounds, and Figtree font. All navigation, forms, and content display correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete design overhaul from green (#3eb489) to gold/navy theme verified. All test specs updated to match new color values. Executive Inquiry form submission on Serbia Executive page is MOCKED (by design). Comment submission on Serbia Executive page has been fixed (was BUG-001 in previous iteration).

colors.ea-gold: #D5B781 - gold, verified in accents and Serbia Executive CTA
